title: tuberaria vulgaris f. sufruticosa
intro: Tuberaria vulgaris f. sufruticosa, also known as the common rockrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Cistaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent effects. The health benefits of Tuberaria vulgaris f. sufruticosa include soothing skin irritations, treating wounds, and reducing fever. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health issues.
